/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o main   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/media/kainas/ubuntu/libtorch/lib /media/kainas/ubuntu/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /media/kainas/ubuntu/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/media/kainas/ubuntu/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /media/kainas/ubuntu/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/media/kainas/ubuntu/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
